hops.name: Citra
hops.pairing_notes: Strong citrus and tropical character; can dominate subtle styles.

hops.name: Mosaic
hops.pairing_notes: Flexible IPA hop with broad fruit and resin character.

hops.name: Cascade
hops.pairing_notes: Classic American hop that works well in pale ales.

hops.name: Saaz
hops.pairing_notes: Soft noble character suited to lagers and delicate beers.

hops.name: Hallertau Mittelfruh
hops.pairing_notes: Gentle noble hop that supports clean lager profiles.

hops.name: Amarillo
hops.pairing_notes: Works well when orange and floral notes are welcome.
